## What does this change?

<!-- A short summary of the change and the motivation. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the architecture rules in `AGENTS.md` (layering / dependency direction)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm coverage && pnpm build` pass
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) for public API changes
- [ ] Docs / README updated where relevant
